content: NFS-e for MEI: National system (Resolucao CGSN 169/2022) is free, works nationwide. Requires only 3 fields: client CPF/CNPJ, service type, value. Official emission via nfe.gov.br (Emissor Nacional). No digital certificate needed for NFS-e. NF-e (product) still requires e-CNPJ (costly). PIX is dominant payment method. MEI can generate static PIX QR codes (BR Code EMV) at zero cost using their own PIX key - no gateway needed. PIX copia-e-cola sharing via WhatsApp is common practice for charging clients. Government's 'Meu MEI Digital' app (2026) offers NFS-e emission, DAS management, and financial control in one official free app.
